searchFilters.name: tffs
searchFilters.description: Moonphase Date, Self-winding mechanical movement beating at 25'200 vibrations per hour, with a monocrystalline silicon balance-spring power reserve up to 72 hours.  18 karat gold medallion with caravelle, Water-resistant to 3 bar, Scratch-resistant sapphire crystal, with several layers of anti-reflective coating on both sides.

flatPages.title: privay
flatPages.description:
Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 2, 2026

Welcome to Heli Seeker. By accessing or using our website, mobile application, or related services (collectively, the "Platform"), you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Platform.

1. Information We Collect

We collect information in several ways, including:

  1. Information you provide when registering or creating an account
  2. Information collected through your use of the Platform
  3. Cookies and similar tracking technologies
  4. Information from third-party sources when you interact with external services

2. How We Use Your Information

The information we collect is used to:

  1. Provide and improve our services
  2. Personalize your experience on the Platform
  3. Send you updates, notifications, and promotional content
  4. Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
  5. Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms

3. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

4. Third-Party Sharing

We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information with:

  1. Care providers and service partners when you request their services
  2. Legal authorities when required by law
  3. Business partners who assist us in providing Platform services

5. Cookies and Tracking

We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on the Platform. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of certain Platform features.

6. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  1. Access your personal data
  2. Correct inaccurate information
  3. Request deletion of your data
  4. Opt-out of marketing communications
  5. Restrict how your data is processed

7. Data Retention

We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Once no longer needed, your data will be securely deleted or anonymized.

8. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

Email: privacy@heliseeker.com

Phone: +91 9373 73638

Address: Heli Seeker Ltd, Care Discovery Center, Global City

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or legal requireme

flatPages.description:
Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: 09/02/2026

Welcome to Heli Seeker. By accessing or using our website, mobile application, or related services (collectively, the "Platform"), you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Platform.

1. About Heli Seeker

Welcome to Heli Seeker. By accessing or using this platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please discontinue using the platform.

Heli Seeker does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

Heli Seeker is a care discovery platform created to help users find and explore healthcare, therapy, and support centers based on their needs such as age, language, issue type, and location. Heli Seeker does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or healthcare services. All information displayed on the platform is intended for general informational purposes only.

3. Nature of the Platform

The platform acts solely as an intermediary that connects users with independent care providers. Heli Seeker does not own, manage, operate, or endorse any listed center or professional. Any decision to engage with a care provider is made solely by the user, and users are encouraged to verify all information directly with the service provider before proceeding.

4. No Medical Advice Disclaimer

The content available on Heli Seeker should not be considered a substitute for professional medical advice. Users should always consult qualified healthcare professionals for diagnosis, treatment, or medical decisions. In the event of a medical emergency, users should contact local emergency services immediately.

Heli Seeker does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or healthcare services. All information displayed on the platform is intended for general informational purposes only.

5. Accuracy of Information

The content on this Platform is not medical advice.

While we strive to keep all listings accurate and up to date, Heli Seeker does not guarantee the completeness, reliability, or accuracy of the information provided by third parties. Service details such as availability, exclusive offer, certifications, and treatments may change without notice. Heli Seeker shall not be held responsible for any inaccuracies or outdated information.

6. User Responsibilities

While we strive to keep information accurate and updated:

By using the platform, users agree to provide accurate information and to use the platform responsibly. Any misuse of the platform, including submitting false information, attempting to disrupt platform functionality, or misusing platform content, may result in restricted or terminated access.

Heli Seeker does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or healthcare services. All information displayed on the platform is intended for general informational purposes only.

7. Listings & Rankings
